claim_limit: outlier threshold-count or DBSCAN core-count summary only; not row-returning neighbors or full DBSCAN cluster expansion
comparable_metric_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count/core-count result with identical radius, threshold, fixture, and copies
notes: Optional SciPy/reference-neighbor baseline for the same compact DBSCAN core-threshold contract.
This artifact does not authorize a full DBSCAN or public RTX speedup claim.

validation.method: SciPy cKDTree fixed-radius neighbor rows reduced to DBSCAN core-flag summary
